title: Better Armor Craft
description: This is a mod for replace the craft of armor
body:
This mod replace the craft of armor with a new machine. The Wiki is [here](https://better-armor-craft-mod.fandom.com/wiki/Better_Armor_Craft_Mod_Wiki) !

 List of the items :

- Evolve Machine : shel allows to craft the armor more simply. She reduce the manufacturing cost from 5 diamonds to 2 diamonds.

- Broken Armors : Craft nuggets with the material of your choice, and craft an armor with nuggets. you have now a broken armor. Take it in the Evolve Machine with the material ingot and you have your armor for only 2 ingots !

Here's my discord for suggest ideas or report an issue : https://discord.gg/7yXRx6yVVy
